ddls:
CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type (e.g., all, analog input, digital output) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the object type (e.g., temperature, pressure, flow) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the object type (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit, PSI) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the object type (e.g., integer, float, boolean) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the object type */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the object type */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., present value, status flags) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the property (e.g., integer, float, boolean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bacnet_types" (
  "bacnet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BACnet data type */,
  "bacnet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the BACnet data type (e.g., BACnetObjectIdentifier, Bit String) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BACnet data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bacnet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opc_types" (
  "opc_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OPC data type */,
  "opc_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the OPC data type (e.g., UInt32, Array of Boolean) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the OPC data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_type_properties" (
  "object_type_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type-property association */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object type */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "property_index" INTEGER /* Index of the property in the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_type_properties_object_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("object_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_type_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_data_types" (
  "property_data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-data type association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "bacnet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the BACnet data type */,
  "opc_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the OPC data type */,
  "bacnet_bit_offset" INTEGER /* Bit offset for BACnet bit string */,
  "opc_array_index" INTEGER /* Array index for OPC array */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_data_types_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_data_types_bacnet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bacnet_type_id") REFERENCES bacnet_types ("bacnet_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_data_types_opc_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("opc_type_id") REFERENCES opc_types ("opc_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., PLC, sensor) */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Connection type (e.g., BACnet, OPC) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number of the device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_objects" (
  "device_object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-object association */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object type */,
  "object_instance_number" INTEGER /* Instance number of the object */,
  "object_index" INTEGER /* Index of the object in the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_objects_object_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("object_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_objects_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_properties" (
  "object_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object-property association */,
  "device_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device-object association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the property value (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_properties_device_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_object_id") REFERENCES device_objects ("device_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, operator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device-object association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_object_id") REFERENCES device_objects ("device_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., device connected, object created) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event triggering the notification */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event triggering the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "device_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device-object association */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of the alarm (e.g., high limit, low limit) */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "alarm_date" TEXT /* Date when the alarm occurred */,
  "alarm_time" TEXT /* Time when the alarm occurred */,
  "acknowledged" INTEGER /* Acknowledged status of the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_device_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_object_id") REFERENCES device_objects ("device_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "device_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device-object association */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the trend (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_device_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_object_id") REFERENCES device_objects ("device_object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "device_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device-object association */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of the chart (e.g., line, bar, pie) */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "x_axis" TEXT /* X-axis label of the chart */,
  "y_axis" TEXT /* Y-axis label of the chart */,
  "chart_data" TEXT /* Chart data (e.g., image, JSON data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_device_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_object_id") REFERENCES device_objects ("device_object_id")
)
